changeSet.author: eqms
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO record_retention_policies (organization_id, record_type, retention_years, disposition_method, legal_basis, active) VALUES (NULL, 'Document', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default controlled-document retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'Capa', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default CAPA record retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'Deviation', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default deviation record retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'NonConformance', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default nonconformance record retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'ChangeControl', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default change-control record retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'Risk', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default risk record retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'Material', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default material record retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'OosCase', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default OOS/OOT record retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'BatchRecord', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default batch record retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'Audit', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default audit record retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'Supplier', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default supplier record retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'Equipment', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default equipment record retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'ManagementReview', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default management review retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'Complaint', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default complaint record retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'Product', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default product master record retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'TrainingProgram', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default training record retention pending organization-specific policy.', true), (NULL, 'QmsProcess', 10, 'ARCHIVE_REVIEW', 'Default process register retention pending organization-specific policy.', true) ON CONFLICT (organization_id, record_type) DO NOTHING;
